objective: Reach QQ音乐 search results, activate a visible result row through row detection, press the result play control, and verify the resulting now-playing title through the observed AX tree.

query.note: Current fallback baseline starts from the ASCII query aa.

requested_title.note: Optional user-intended title for coverage reporting when the verified playback title is different from the semantic request.

target_title.note: The expected now-playing title that must be verified through the AX tree after row activation.

observed_playback_title.note: The observed bottom-player title used for candidate reporting when the target title is not yet proven.

row_wait_min_row_count.note: Wait until at least this many visible rows appear before row activation.

row_index.note: 1-based index of the visible result row to activate. The current canonical fallback baseline uses 2 in the current QQ音乐 layout.

click_count.note: The first validated activation path is a row double-click.

activation_settle_ms.note: How long to wait after row activation before capturing evidence.

target_artist.note: Optional artist disambiguation for Chinese target-title verification.

now_playing_scope_path_prefix.note: Optional AX path prefix that narrows verification to the player title region.

preconditions: QQ音乐 is installed and can be addressed by ${app_id}.
Screen Recording and Accessibility permissions are already granted.
The recipe runs on the live desktop, re-activates QQ音乐 before live capture steps, and still uses pointer disturbance for activation.

notes: This recipe is not non-disturbing. It foregrounds QQ音乐, re-activates QQ音乐 before live capture steps, uses the clipboard during search entry, and uses pointer disturbance for row activation.
The row-detection step is observation-only; playback verification now prefers AX tree matching instead of screenshot OCR.
This is a narrow experimental playback fallback, not a general qqmusic.play_song contract.

expected_signals: The query is submitted through clipboard-backed search entry.
debug.waitForScreenRows reports enough visible rows in the constrained result region.
debug.clickScreenRow reports row bounds and a projected logical click point.
debug.clickScreenText completes for the result play control.
debug.verifyNowPlayingTitle confirms ${target_title} from the AX tree without relying on screenshot OCR.
success_criteria: A visible row is activated through row detection.
The result play control is pressed.
The current now-playing title is verified through the AX tree.
non_goals: This recipe does not prove generalized playback for arbitrary queries.
This recipe does not prove OCR row anchor stability.
This recipe does not prove pointer-free playback activation.
This recipe does not prove that row selection alone starts playback.

known_limits.narrow_baseline: This recipe is validated only as a narrow fallback slice and should not yet be advertised as a broad QQ音乐 playback skill.
known_limits.row_detection: Result activation depends on row detection plus pointer disturbance through the projected row anchor and a follow-up play control press.
known_limits.target_disambiguation: Chinese target-title cases currently rely on row activation plus now-playing AX verification; result-area AX title/artist targeting is diagnostic only.
known_limits.foreground_capture: Live capture steps explicitly re-activate QQ音乐 before taking screenshots so foreground drift does not contaminate evidence.
known_limits.captured_image_verification: Playback verification now prefers AX tree title matching over screenshot OCR.
known_limits.candidate_reporting: When the target title is not yet proven, record the observed playback title separately instead of rewriting the target title.
known_limits.shared_app_state: Do not run multiple QQ音乐 recipes against the same live app instance at once.
